_doc: Plany montazu Skrolik — baza + 2 warianty hooka (PACK max 3). Music-forward, SFX diegetic klik/scroll, ambient, LOOP CLOSE, -14 LUFS.
hookA_coldopen: money-shot demo (1.2s zoom+lift) prepended -> body [hook,demo,kontekst,kolory,cta]; 13.9s; $0 re-cut
hookB_bed: hook wymieniony na 'scroll w lozku' (bright morning bed, problem-first) -> [hookvar2,demo,kontekst,kolory,cta]; 14.7s; ~$0.43

hook_captions_pl.hookB: Scrollujesz w lozku bez trzymania telefonu
